Home.headline:
Split costs.
Stay friends.
Home.subtitle: One link, no signup. Everyone adds what they paid — Splita handles the math.
Home.title: Split shared costs fast.
Home.description: Split expenses with friends. Simple, instant, no sign-up.
Home.recentDescription: Jump back into a group you opened on this device.
Home.recentEmpty: No recent groups on this device yet.
Home.featureOneBody: Share one group link and let everyone add members and expenses directly.
Home.featureTwoBody: Each group uses one currency for expenses, balances, settlement, and CSV export.
Home.featureThreeBody: Everything important fits on a phone: members, expenses, balances, settlement, and CSV export.

GroupForm.title: Create group
GroupForm.description: Start with a name, choose the group currency, and add optional members. You can add more people after sharing the link.
GroupForm.currencyHint: Choose one currency for the whole group. All expenses and settlements use it.
GroupForm.membersPlaceholder: Type a name and add it

GroupCreated.title: Group created
GroupCreated.description: {name} is ready. Share the link, then continue into the group.
GroupCreated.linkDescription: Anyone with this link can open the group, add expenses, and stay in the same group currency.

GroupPage.shareLinkBody: Share this one link with everyone who should open and edit this group.
GroupPage.expenseFormDescription: Record a new shared expense for this group.
GroupPage.expenseEditDescription: Update this expense and the balances will recalculate immediately.
GroupPage.deleteExpenseHint: Delete this expense if it was entered by mistake or needs to be removed entirely.
GroupPage.expenseNotesPlaceholder: Any note you want to keep in the original language.
GroupPage.emptyMembers: Add at least one member before recording expenses.
GroupPage.emptyExpensesNoMembersBody: This group is ready, but expenses can only start after the first member is added.
GroupPage.emptyExpensesReadyBody: This group has members and is ready for the first expense.
GroupPage.emptyExpensesReadyAction: Use the add expense button to record the first shared cost.
GroupPage.addMemberFirstHint: Add the first member above, then you can record expenses and calculate balances.
GroupPage.balancesIntro: Each balance shows how far each member is from even after all recorded expenses.
GroupPage.settlementIntro: Review the records, compare balances, then use the suggested transfers in the group's currency to settle up.
GroupPage.rawExpensesIntro: These are the source expense entries currently included in the calculation.
GroupPage.recommendedTransfersIntro: These transfers use a simple greedy matching between debtors and creditors.
GroupPage.groupSettlementSummaryBody: This is a lightweight summary of who currently needs to pay whom.
GroupPage.moreSettlementsHint: +{count} more transfers on the settlement page.
GroupPage.shareSummary: {count, plural, one {Split with # person} other {Split with # people}}

Feedback.invalidGroup: Please enter a group name and choose a currency. Member lines can be left blank, but each filled line must be valid.
Feedback.invalidMember: Enter a valid member name before adding someone.
Feedback.invalidExpense: Please complete the expense form and select at least one participant.
Feedback.invalidAmount: Enter a valid amount for this group currency.
Feedback.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
